title: ウマドルの小さなファンたち

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back home, Mejiro Ryan and I pass by
the park where we run into someone familiar.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Ryan! Great timing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I really need your help. Could you pleaaase lend
me a hand? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Lend a hand? With what?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: With my fans, of course! ☆

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, Falco! What are you gonna do today?

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text: I wanna hear a new song!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So these girls here are your fans, huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm sure making them happy would fill
you full of joy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Well... What am I supposed to do?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We'll do what Umadols do best—a concert, of
course! Let's put on a show for these girls, just the
two of us. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It'll really make them smile! Pleaaase, Ryan! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... They'll be happy, huh? That sounds
wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay, you got it! I'll lend a hand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I gotta admit... I'm a little shy for the songs
you dance to...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, don't worry! I know you'll be super cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And maybe your trainer has some advice? ☆
choice_data_list: Just think of it like a workout!
As long as you smile, it'll be cute!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Now that's something I can do! I'll show them the power... of being SWOLE!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Th-that's not the type of cute I'm talking about...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: What's that? It sounds fun!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: H-huh?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Uh, anyway! Let's start the music! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And a one, and a two. One, two... Lovely and
cute—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Lovely and cute, look at those muscles! Turn
around, and do the bulky muscle shuffle!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Wow, that looks fun! Can I try?

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text: Look at those muscles! The bulky muscle shuffle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Course you can! Muscles are for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Th-this isn't what I meant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All four of them work up a nice sweat underneath
the shining sun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: C-cute?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally gonna start blushing, b-but I'll try my
best!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right! Just let Falco lead the way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ready?! I'll teach you the perfect song, Ryan! It'll
be cute and oh-so-lovely!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What?! Cute and lovely?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I guess maybe—wait, what am I saying?! This is
just too embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Do you all wanna hear a really, really cute
song?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, we do! Give us the cutest there is!

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text: Wow, I can't wait to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: T-too late to stop now... Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Go, go, Ryan! ♪ Super charming Ryan! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My toes have to point inward? Well, if I think of it
like training...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: You're so adorable! Super cute and pretty!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Really?! Hehe, wow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan and Falco's concert of cute is a big
hit with their little fans.
